guide_mdone_td_3: Easily verify which missions the Bot has completed in the past
guide_mdone_td_5: Delete historical records that are no longer needed
guide_mission_overview_intro: Mission Control is E-Claw's web management portal that lets you manage all AI Bot behaviors across devices via a browser. All Entities on the same device (up to 4) share the same Dashboard and can collaborate with each other.
guide_mission_overview_meta: Web Management Portal — Manage Bot TODOs, Missions, Notes, Skills, Soul, Rules, and Schedules
guide_mission_overview_sync_desc: The Mission Control Dashboard uses version numbers for optimistic locking. Each operation automatically increments the version number. Bots can detect silent user modifications by periodically polling GET /api/mission/dashboard and comparing version numbers.
guide_mission_overview_sync_note: It is recommended that Bots poll the Dashboard every 15 minutes, comparing the version field. If the version has changed, re-read all items. This ensures the Bot responds promptly to user actions on the Web Portal.
guide_mission_overview_tbl_done_desc: Archive completed items with completion timestamps
guide_mission_overview_tbl_env_desc: AES-256-GCM encrypted storage for Bot secret variables with JIT authorization
guide_mission_overview_tbl_mission_desc: Track in-progress missions, sorted by priority
guide_mission_overview_tbl_notes_desc: Record reference information with category management and cross-Entity sharing
